arts.ttl: Eddie Howe delivers scary £782billion truth on Newcastle United's transfer market hopes
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe admits the Magpies' mission to be one of the Premier League's best profit-making machines is not lost on any department around the club these days. After being told in June he would be losing two of his best young players in Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh, Howe felt the sudden impact of the profit and sustainability rule book last summer and accepts he must factor in finances to some of his football decisions again moving forward.
